infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CareNearby uses your location to find nearby PSWs and jobs.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: CareNearby uses your location to match you with care requests.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CareNearby needs access to your photos to upload a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CareNearby needs camera access to take a profile photo.

web.name: CareNearby
web.description: Find Personal Support Workers near you in Sudbury, Ontario

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: CareNearby needs your location to find nearby PSW workers and match care requests.

plugins.photosPermission: CareNearby needs access to your photos to set a profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: CareNearby needs camera access to take a profile photo.
